name: EA
philosophy: EA's web presence is sports-and-blockbuster-gaming chrome — the EA wordmark in heavy display sans, a dark canvas (#0d0d0d) on franchise pages, and a master brand chrome that connects FIFA (now EA Sports FC), Madden, Battlefield, The Sims, and Apex Legends. The atmosphere is sports-broadcast cinematic where the IP demands and corporate-master-brand where the chrome takes over.

design_language.motion_signature: Trailer-grade hero motion with slow parallax and live-action gameplay cuts. Card hover triggers a tight 150ms scale + slight bloom. EA Play membership chrome introduces a vertical accent line on hover-state for premium cards.

trademark_signals: EA wordmark in heavy display sans — pinned top-left, brand mark across franchises
Dark canvas (#0d0d0d) on franchise pages — sports-broadcast cinematic backdrop
EA Play membership chrome — premium accent bar on subscriber-only content
Franchise-specific palettes — FIFA/FC green, Madden navy, Battlefield orange, Sims plumbob green, Apex red
Rectilinear UI (0–8px radius) — the brand reads as console-game-store
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace the dark franchise canvas with light surfaces
Don't strip the franchise palettes — each game brings its own IP color identity
Don't soften card radii — EA reads as a game store, not consumer SaaS
Don't blur EA Play premium chrome into free content — the accent bar is part of the IA
